title: oncoma pulchellum
intro: Oncoma pulchellum, also known as the autumn gentian or little gentian, is a flowering plant species within the Gentianaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oncoma pulchellum include its potential to treat gastrointestinal issues, such as constipation and indigestion, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Oncoma pulchellum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support digestive health and overall well-being.
